column1: Xavier Edwards leads the slate with a strong combination of recent form and a top lineup spot at home, benefiting from a favorable park and a clear platoon edge against Tobias Myers. Ildemaro Vargas is also in a great position, showing excellent consistency and a high rate of games with a hit, plus his own platoon advantage in a solid hitting environment. Matt Olson and Luis Arraez offer steady profiles with good matchups, but Edwards and Vargas stand out for reliability and opportunity.
